ddls:
CREATE TABLE "genomic_data" (
  "data_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each genomic data entry */,
  "individual" TEXT /* Identifier for the individual patient */,
  "chr1" TEXT /* Chromosome number of the first breakpoint */,
  "str1" INTEGER /* Strand orientation (0 or 1) of the first breakpoint */,
  "pos1" INTEGER /* Position of the first breakpoint */,
  "chr2" TEXT /* Chromosome number of the second breakpoint */,
  "pos2" INTEGER /* Position of the second breakpoint */,
  "class" TEXT /* Class of the genomic event (e.g., long_range, deletion, inter_chr) */,
  "span" REAL /* Span between the two breakpoints */,
  "tumreads" INTEGER /* Number of tumor reads supporting the fusion */,
  "normreads" INTEGER /* Number of normal reads supporting the fusion */,
  "gene1" TEXT /* Name of the first gene involved in the fusion */,
  "gene2" TEXT /* Name of the second gene involved in the fusion */,
  "site1" TEXT /* Description of the first breakpoint site */,
  "site2" TEXT /* Description of the second breakpoint site */,
  "fusion" TEXT /* Detailed fusion sequence information */,
  "quality" REAL /* Quality score of the fusion event */,
  "score" REAL /* Score of the fusion event */,
  "bp_result" INTEGER /* Breakpoint result (e.g., -1, 1) */,
  "validation_result" TEXT /* Validation result of the fusion event */,
  "analysis_date" TEXT /* Date when the genomic data was analyzed */,
  "analysis_by" TEXT /* Name of the researcher who analyzed the data */,
  "data_source" TEXT /* Source of the genomic data (e.g., sequencing platform, array type) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("data_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_genomic_data_gene2 FOREIGN KEY ("gene2") REFERENCES genes ("gene_name"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_genomic_data_individual FOREIGN KEY ("individual") REFERENCES individuals ("individual_name"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_genomic_data_gene1 FOREIGN KEY ("gene1") REFERENCES genes ("gene_name")
)

CREATE TABLE "individuals" (
  "individual_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each individual */,
  "individual_name" TEXT /* Name or identifier of the individual */,
  "age" INTEGER /* Age of the individual */,
  "gender" TEXT /* Gender of the individual */,
  "diagnosis" TEXT /* Diagnosis of the individual */,
  "clinical_trial_id" TEXT /* ID of the clinical trial the individual is part of */,
  "disease_stage" TEXT /* Disease stage of the individual (e.g., stage I, stage IV) */,
  "treatment_history" TEXT /* Treatment history of the individual (e.g., chemotherapy, radiation therapy) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("individual_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_individuals_clinical_trial_id FOREIGN KEY ("clinical_trial_id") REFERENCES clinical_trials ("trial_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "genes" (
  "gene_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each gene */,
  "gene_name" TEXT /* Name of the gene */,
  "chromosome" TEXT /* Chromosome on which the gene is located */,
  "start_position" INTEGER /* Start position of the gene */,
  "end_position" INTEGER /* End position of the gene */,
  "strand" TEXT /* Strand orientation of the gene (e.g., +, -) */,
  "gene_description" TEXT /* Description of the gene */,
  "gene_function" TEXT /* Function of the gene (e.g., tumor suppressor, oncogene) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("gene_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "sites" (
  "site_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each site */,
  "site_name" TEXT /* Name of the site */,
  "location" TEXT /* Location of the site */,
  "contact_email" TEXT /* Contact email for inquiries about the site */,
  "site_principal_investigator" TEXT /* Name of the principal investigator at the site */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("site_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "clinical_trials" (
  "trial_id" TEXT /* Unique identifier for each clinical trial */,
  "trial_name" TEXT /* Name of the clinical trial */,
  "start_date" TEXT /* Start date of the clinical trial */,
  "end_date" TEXT /* End date of the clinical trial */,
  "principal_investigator" TEXT /* Principal investigator of the clinical trial */,
  "status" TEXT /* Status of the clinical trial (e.g., ongoing, completed) */,
  "trial_description" TEXT /* Description of the clinical trial */,
  "inclusion_criteria" TEXT /* Inclusion criteria for the clinical trial */,
  "exclusion_criteria" TEXT /* Exclusion criteria for the clinical trial */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("trial_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "users" (
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user */,
  "user_name" TEXT /* Full name of the user */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the user */,
  "role" TEXT /* Role of the user (e.g., researcher, data analyst, admin) */,
  "affiliation" TEXT /* Affiliation of the user (e.g., university, hospital) */,
  "research_interests" TEXT /* Research interests of the user */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "access_logs" (
  "access_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each access event */,
  "data_id" INTEGER /* ID of the genomic data being accessed */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user accessing the data */,
  "access_date" TEXT /* Date when the data was accessed */,
  "access_type" TEXT /* Type of access (e.g., view, download) */,
  "access_purpose" TEXT /* Purpose of the access (e.g., research, quality control) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("access_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_access_logs_data_id FOREIGN KEY ("data_id") REFERENCES genomic_data ("data_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_access_logs_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "validation_results" (
  "result_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each validation result */,
  "data_id" INTEGER /* ID of the genomic data being validated */,
  "validation_date" TEXT /* Date when the validation was performed */,
  "validated_by" TEXT /* Name of the person who performed the validation */,
  "validation_status" TEXT /* Status of the validation (e.g., somatic, not_subjected_to_validation) */,
  "validation_notes" TEXT /* Notes or comments from the validation process */,
  "validation_method" TEXT /* Method used for validation (e.g., PCR, sequencing) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("result_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_validation_results_data_id FOREIGN KEY ("data_id") REFERENCES genomic_data ("data_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "sequencing_runs" (
  "run_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each sequencing run */,
  "run_date" TEXT /* Date when the sequencing run was performed */,
  "sequencing_platform" TEXT /* Type of sequencing platform used */,
  "library_type" TEXT /* Type of library used (e.g., paired-end, single-end) */,
  "read_length" INTEGER /* Length of the sequencing reads */,
  "depth_of_coverage" INTEGER /* Depth of coverage achieved in the sequencing run */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("run_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "genomic_data_sequencing_runs" (
  "data_id" INTEGER /* ID of the genomic data */,
  "run_id" INTEGER /* ID of the sequencing run that generated the data */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("data_id", "run_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "publications" (
  "publication_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each publication */,
  "title" TEXT /* Title of the publication */,
  "authors" TEXT /* Authors of the publication */,
  "journal" TEXT /* Journal where the publication was published */,
  "year" INTEGER /* Year of publication */,
  "doi" TEXT /* DOI of the publication */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("publication_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "genomic_data_publications" (
  "data_id" INTEGER /* ID of the genomic data */,
  "publication_id" INTEGER /* ID of the publication associated with the data */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("data_id", "publication_id")
)
